message:
Fix CI: use Go 1.23 and skip tests when fixture unavailable

- Change Go version from non-existent 1.25 to stable 1.23
- Make sample integration tests skip instead of fail when the
  beads_reference fixture isn't available (e.g., in CI)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:
     - name: Set up Go
       uses: actions/setup-go@v5
       with:
-        go-version: '1.25'
+        go-version: '1.23'
         
     - name: Build
       run: go build -v ./cmd/bv/main.go

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ jobs:
           fetch-depth: 0
       - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
         with:
-          go-version: '1.25'
+          go-version: '1.23'
       - name: Run GoReleaser
         uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v5
         with:
